messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: respawnAgent's retry backoff blocks on a real Atomics.wait, so four tests each burn 0.78s of wall clock
What it solves: ⚠ THIS IS NOT THE TICKET THE INTAKE THOUGHT IT WAS — AND THAT MATTERS. The intake listed
`tmuxClient` (8.3s) as a long pole and hypothesised it had the same "serial boot inside one
file" shape as dependencyGateCli, while explicitly asking the specifier to VERIFY per file
rather than assume. Verifie…
How it works: A test drives the whole retry loop with no real time passing
